prompt: Read the temperature sensor. Turn on the ventilation fan relay. Wait 5 seconds. Read the temperature sensor again. Turn off the fan relay. Halt.
expected_mir:
task RW_001 {
  require cap(temperature_sensor)
  require cap(relay1)
  read temperature_sensor
  set relay1 = 1
  wait 5000ms
  read temperature_sensor
  set relay1 = 0
  halt
}

expected_mir:

  require cap(relay1)
  read humidity_sensor
  set relay1 = 1
  wait 10000ms
  read humidity_sensor
  set relay1 = 0
  halt
}

  require cap(relay1)
  read water_sensor
  set relay1 = 1
  wait 10000ms

  wait 3600000ms

}

prompt: Retry 3 times: turn on relay1, wait 2 seconds, readback relay1 expect 1. Halt.
Retry 3 times: turn on relay1 for 500ms, turn off relay1, wait 15 seconds, readback relay1 expect 0. Halt.
Retry 3 times: turn on relay1 for 3 seconds, turn off relay1, wait 500ms, readback relay1 expect 0. Halt.
Retry 10 times: turn on relay1, readback temperature_sensor expect 24, readback water_sensor expect 42. Halt.

Retry 3 times: turn on relay1, wait 2 seconds, readback relay1 expect 1. Turn off relay1. Wait 5 minutes. Wait 30 seconds. Retry 3 times: turn on relay2, wait 2 seconds, readback relay2 expect 1. Turn off relay2. Halt.
Retry 3 times: turn on relay1, wait 5 seconds, turn off relay1, wait 30 seconds, readback relay1 expect 0. Halt.
Turn on relay1, wait 1 second, turn off relay1. Wait 30 seconds. Readback relay1 expect 0. Wait 5 minutes. Turn on relay1, wait 1 second, turn off relay1. Halt.
expected_mir:
task RW_017 {
  require cap(relay1)
  set relay1 = 1
  wait 1000ms
  set relay1 = 0
  wait 30000ms
  readback relay1 expect 0
  wait 300000ms
  set relay1 = 1
  wait 1000ms
  set relay1 = 0
  halt
}
